response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed systems experience, deep Python/TypeScript fluency, and proven ownership in AI-agent infrastructure at Naver — aligning closely with the role’s core demands. His open-source tooling and operational depth (CI/CD, on-call readiness) reinforce his fit, though limited explicit AI/ML product experience and lack of agile role documentation are minor gaps.
strengths: Proven staff-level experience in AI-agent infrastructure at Naver with MCP code generators
Deep expertise in high-throughput distributed systems via Tencent, Dunnhumby, and real-time data platforms
Strong operational ownership demonstrated through CI/CD, monitoring, and open-source tooling contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of LLM or ML product experience beyond infrastructure tooling
Agile ceremonies and scrum champion role not explicitly documented in resume
German language proficiency is basic, which may limit stakeholder alignment in Berlin-based teams
